case_title: BROWNLEE GEORGE et al VS SAVAGE PAULA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BROWNLEE GEORGE REEVES CLARENCE AS TO DEFENDANT SAVAGE PAULA VAN GENEIJGEN FRED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAVAGE PAULA

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,473.35 FILED BY SAVAGE PAULA VAN GENEIJGEN FRED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BROWNLEE GEORGE REEVES CLARENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWNLEE GEORGE REEVES CLARENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAVAGE PAULA VAN GENEIJGEN FRED $1,088.95 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,088.95, X COMP JUDGMENT ORDERED FOR PLT AND AGANIST DEF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SAVAGE PAULA VAN GENEIJGEN FRED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BROWNLEE GEORGE REEVES CLARENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT VAN GENEIJGEN FRED HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 02
EXECUTION FOR $ ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY. 2306W105 $3.50
STAY ON WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED
STAY ON WRIT OF EXECUTION SIGNED BY JUDGE WM MALLEN.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF MAR-18-1991, DENIED
STAY ON WRIT OF EXECUTION TO SAN MATEO CO SIGNED BY JUDGE MALLEN 3/13/91.
